primary_categories.finance: Banking, credit cards, transactions, statements (Chase, AmEx, HDFC, SBI, etc.)
primary_categories.receipts: Payment confirmations, invoices, proof of purchase
primary_categories.orders_shipping: Order confirmations, shipping updates, delivery tracking
primary_categories.travel: Flight, hotel, rental bookings and updates
primary_categories.job: Job applications, interviews, recruiter outreach, offers
primary_categories.social: Social media notifications (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)
primary_categories.promotions: Marketing emails, discounts, ads, sales campaigns
primary_categories.newsletters: Subscribed content like blogs, Substack, news digests
primary_categories.security: OTP codes, password resets, login alerts, verification emails
primary_categories.subscriptions: Service-related updates (Netflix, SaaS tools, billing cycles)
primary_categories.health: Medical appointments, lab results, insurance communication
primary_categories.other: Anything that doesn't fit into the above categories

tags.time_sensitive: Requires attention soon (deadlines, expiring links, events)
tags.requires_action: User needs to take action (reply, pay, confirm, etc.)
